description:
Summer is here and the dogs are OUT (and we're not talking about our feetsies)! The water is cool, the heat is on, and the fails are imminent. 

We're the happy place for animal lovers!  You’ll always find real pets, real joy and real moments that remind you why animals make life better, here at The Pet Collective.

title: It's A Dog Party, It's A Dog Pool Party! | Funny Animal Compilation
